value.found_quote:
## Permissions and security model

Automations run unattended and use your default sandbox settings.

- If your sandbox mode is **read-only**, tool calls fail if they require modifying files, accessing network, or working with apps on your computer.
value.rationale: The page contains a "Permissions and security model" section stating automations run unattended using default sandbox settings, and describes read-only, workspace-write, and full access sandbox modes — matching the claim.
